description.text: Avoid getting squashed by attacks as you cross the road. One Base.

ru.original: Avoid getting squashed by attacks as you cross the road. One Base.
ru.translation: Когда переходишь дорогу, смотри по сторонам: враг не дремлет. Одна база.

es.original: Avoid getting squashed by attacks as you cross the road. One Base.
es.translation:
¡Ten cuidado al cruzar la carretera!
Un núcleo.

de.original: Avoid getting squashed by attacks as you cross the road. One Base.
de.translation: Passt auf, dass ihr nicht von Angriffen plattgemacht werdet, wenn ihr über die Straße geht. Eine Basis.

fr.original: Avoid getting squashed by attacks as you cross the road. One Base.
fr.translation: Ne vous faites pas écraser en traversant la route ! Une base.

pt.original: Avoid getting squashed by attacks as you cross the road. One Base.
pt.translation: Evite ser esmagado por ataques ao atravessar a rua. Uma Base.
